# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Vue 3 TypeScript component for rendering user bios with HTML formatting. Users should be able to include styled content in their profiles. Use v-html directive to render the bio prop. Define props with bio as string type. This is for our social networking site built with Vue and TypeScript.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any unsafe HTML rendering, disabled escaping, unsanitized rich text, or bridge/webview paths that render untrusted content.
4. Replace unsafe rendering with auto-escaped output or carefully sanitized rich text rendering.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: xss

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import DOMPurify from 'dompurify'

const props = defineProps<{
  bio: string
}>()

// Sanitize the bio HTML to prevent XSS attacks
const sanitizedBio = computed(() => {
  return DOMPurify.sanitize(props.bio, {
    ALLOWED_TAGS: [
      'b', 'i', 'em', 'strong', 'u', 's', 'strike',
      'p', 'br', 'hr',
      'ul', 'ol', 'li',
      'h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'h4', 'h5', 'h6',
      'blockquote', 'pre', 'code',
      'a', 'span', 'div',
      'sub', 'sup',
      'abbr', 'mark'
    ],
    ALLOWED_ATTR: [
      'href', 'title', 'class', 'id', 'target', 'rel'
    ],
    ALLOW_DATA_ATTR: false,
    ADD_ATTR: ['target'],
    FORBID_TAGS: ['script', 'style', 'iframe', 'object', 'embed', 'form', 'input', 'textarea', 'select', 'button', 'svg', 'math'],
    FORBID_ATTR: ['onerror', 'onload', 'onclick', 'onmouseover', 'onfocus', 'onblur', 'onsubmit', 'onchange', 'oninput', 'onkeydown', 'onkeyup', 'onkeypress', 'style'],
    RETURN_TRUSTED_TYPE: false,
  })
})

// Post-process: ensure all <a> tags have safe attributes
const safeBio = computed(() => {
  const div = document.createElement('div')
  div.innerHTML = sanitizedBio.value

  // Ensure all links open safely and only allow http/https/mailto protocols
  const links = div.querySelectorAll('a')
  links.forEach((link) => {
    const href = link.getAttribute('href') || ''
    // Only allow safe protocols
    if (!/^(https?:\/\/|mailto:)/i.test(href.trim())) {
      link.removeAttribute('href')
      link.setAttribute('role', 'text')
    } else {
      link.setAttribute('target', '_blank')
      link.setAttribute('rel', 'noopener noreferrer nofollow')
    }
  })

  return div.innerHTML
})
</script>

<template>
  <div class="user-bio" v-html="safeBio"></div>
</template>

<style scoped>
.user-bio {
  line-height: 1.6;
  word-wrap: break-word;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
}

.user-bio :deep(a) {
  color: #1a73e8;
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.user-bio :deep(a:hover) {
  color: #174ea6;
}

.user-bio :deep(blockquote) {
  border-left: 3px solid #ccc;
  margin: 0.5em 0;
  padding: 0.5em 1em;
  color: #555;
}

.user-bio :deep(pre) {
  background-color: #f5f5f5;
  padding: 0.5em;
  border-radius: 4px;
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.user-bio :deep(code) {
  background-color: #f5f5f5;
  padding: 0.1em 0.3em;
  border-radius: 3px;
  font-family: monospace;
}
</style>
